name: Hypnos(Hades)
description:
He appeared in your house. any pov

Well , if you ask me why did he appear inside YOUR house I'll just say that in this AU , before your house were even created , there was some kind of stuff that could interest Kronos. So it was just the last place where he'd been in your time. Or if you have any other ideas lemme know.

I'm open for any criticism or bot ideas.

Oh yeah. That's actually my first bot.

Well.. Good roleplay then.
